creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
That is my mistake sorry.  I intended to include this with the next version update, but forgot about it when the next version was several months later.

Just in case there's a next time, the policy within the FreeBSD community is that if you don't get a response in two weeks you can ping the maintainer or send an email to the ports@FreeBSD.org mailing list to get somebody else to look at it.
